row_level_formulas.column_formula: If Profit/Loss after Tax(30600) cummulative (year to date) from 1000 is Negative the value  pulls  to Column D of 300 here (but it should take the absolute value from 1000)which initially was 0, but if it 1000 is positive it takes it to another schedule called other liability (387)

If Profit/Loss after Tax(30560) cummulative (year to date) from 1000 is Negative the value  pulls  to Column D here which initially was 0, but if it 1000 is positive it takes it to another schedule called other liability (387)item code 34715

row_level_formulas.description: Non-Current Asset/Disposal Group held for Sales (Net)
OBS: Short-term self liquidating trade-related contingencies
OBS: Forward asset purchase, forward deposits and partly paid shares and securities
OBS: Note issuance facilities and revolving underwriting facilities
Other commitments (e.g. formal standby facilities and credit lines) with an original maturity of over one year (Specify MFCR374)
Similar commitments with an original maturity of up to one year, or which can be unconditionally cancelled at any time (Specify MFCR376)
